$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for adversarial-reviewer responses (Story 8.1-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; vendor-agnostic verdict shape; extra fields allowed for forward-compat.
title: AdversarialReviewerResponse
description: Structured verdict returned by any adversarial reviewer (Codex, Gemini, SAST, ...) plugged into the reviewer slot.

reviewer_name.description: Name of the reviewer that produced this verdict; matches a key in adversarial-reviewers.yaml.

verdict.description: Reviewer verdict on the pull request.

summary.description: Human-readable one-paragraph summary of the review.

findings.description: Zero or more structured findings supporting the verdict.

file.description: Path of the file the finding refers to.

line.description: Line number, or null when the finding is file-level.
